sections.markdown:
- Activity: Afternoon Run
- Started: 2025-08-12 17:29
- Distance: 8.8 km
- Moving time: 46:49
- Elapsed time: 48:06
- Elevation gain: 141.2 m
- Average heart rate: 160.8 bpm
- Max heart rate: 175 bpm
- Average watts: 240.6 W
- Average speed: 11.2 km/h
- Apple Health recorded `3` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `160.9 bpm`, ranging from `153.4` to `166.4 bpm`.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `172.6 spm`, with a working range of `128.8` to `178.6 spm` after excluding `2` start-stop outliers below `100 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `173.2 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `170.4 spm` (-2.8 spm), which looks mechanically stable.

- Strava moving pace averaged `5:20 /km` across `8.769 km` in `46:49` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `5:07 /km` and second-half pace was `5:34 /km` (+26 s/km), so pace faded meaningfully in the back half.

- Strava summary HR came in at `160.8 bpm` average and `175 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `156.7 bpm` in the first half and `164.7 bpm` in the second (+8.0 bpm), which shows a modest late rise in aerobic cost.

- Moving time was `46:49` out of `48:06` elapsed (97.3%), which shows only minor interruption cost.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `13` stop segments and `1.6%` stationary samples, so the run was mostly continuous with a few interruptions.

- Strava logged about `157.4 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `4.4 m` and `83.2 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `47.2 m` in the first half and `110.2 m` in the second, so most of the climbing landed later.
